title: Health/Disability Related Social Clubs * Autism Spectrum Disorder - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Health/Disability Related Social Clubs * Autism Spectrum Disorder 3 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF AUTISM EMPOWERMENT AUTISM SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides training, educational workshops, and special events for children, teens, and adults in addition to publishing a magazine and producing a podcast. Group activity and program information is available online. Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: No standard hours Email (360) 852-8369 Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY HOUSE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers developmental therapies and supports including in-home occupational and speech therapy, social groups, classes, and tutoring. Also offers parent support groups, parent and child activity groups, parenting classes, and specialized information and referral. 555 E 15th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Families with children living with autism and related disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-3pm Email (541) 345-0805 Get Directions Visit Website More Details FIRST STEPS CENTER FOR AUTISM AND DISABILITIES SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support groups, social opportunities, events, workshops, and resources for individuals and families experiencing neurodivergence. Accepts volunteers. 228 S Main Avenue Warrenton, OR 97146 Eligibility: Teen Group: Neurodivergent teens, ages 13-19 Adult Group: Neurodivergent adults, age 18 and older Parents and Caregivers Group: Parents and caregivers of neurodivergent individuals Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Teen Group: Friday 7pm Adult Group: 3rd Thursday of the month 6pm Parents and Caregivers Group: 2nd Thursday of the month 6pm Email (503) 861-8104 Get Directions Visit Website More Details BRIDGEWAY HOUSE BRIDGEWAY HOUSE FIRST STEPS CENTER FOR AUTISM AND DISABILITIES SUPPORT GROUPS
